allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(json.dumps\(json.loads\(l\), indent=2\)\) for l in sys.stdin]")
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/agents" -TimeoutSec 8; $r | Select-Object name,id | Format-Table -AutoSize } catch { "ERRORE: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
